name: Malden

population.sourceName: US Decennial Census 2020, via Wikipedia list of MA municipalities

majorFacilities.name: Cambridge Health Alliance Malden Care Center

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: behavioral health hospital and hospital-affiliated outpatient clinics
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: Malden has NO acute-care general hospital. The former Malden Hospital closed; its site now holds the Tufts Medicine Behavioral Health Hospital, which opened February 2026 — new and confirmed open, not a legacy name.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
